sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79846" key="parupatoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρῠπᾰτοειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, of a note in music, <sense id="n79846.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sounding like the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παρυπάτη</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
